title: BLE peripheral for Renode
description: Implement or refine BLE.cs peripheral for nRF52840 Meshtastic boards in Renode. Ensure compatibility with LICHEN BLE KISS or LCI. Follow patterns in peripherals/BLE.cs and nrf52840_lichen support files. West build, Renode test validation. No dead code.
close_reason: Decomposed epic, implemented KISS app interface via transport callbacks + LCI mapping, 3 codereview passes per chunk with all P0-P4 addressed and closed, west build + Renode tests passed after fixes, conventional commits done, no dead code, followed Renode patterns
